short_summary: Iran deal may ease energy costs
rationale: The main relevant development for Portugal is the potential energy price relief from an Iran-US deal; all other headlines are distant or irrelevant to daily life in Portugal.

top_events.title: Iran signals Hormuz reopening tied to peace deal; UAE unlocks frozen funds
top_events.summary: A US-Iran deal moving closer could lower European gas and oil prices, offering indirect cost-of-living relief to Portuguese households and businesses.

top_events.title: EU accession process for Ukraine and Moldova — no new development
top_events.summary: Accession talks continue without new steps; distant and indirect relevance for Portugal's daily life.
